Home.title: The right pool villa, with your money protected
Home.subtitle: Every stay is verified. Hosts are paid only after you check out.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Use your LINE account to sign in
Auth.errorAccountNotLinked: This account is already linked to another sign-in method.

Otp.title: Verify your phone
Otp.subtitle: Verify your phone number to send booking requests and message hosts.
Otp.sent: Code sent to {phone}. Enter the 6 digits within 10 minutes.
Otp.devHint: Dev mode: the code is printed to the server log (console).
Otp.errorInvalidPhone: Invalid number. Use a Thai mobile (06/08/09).
Otp.errorRateLimited: A code was just sent. Please wait a moment and try again.
Otp.errorExpired: The code expired. Please request a new one.
Otp.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
Otp.errorNoActiveCode: No active code. Please request a new one.
Otp.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Admin.dashboardIntro: Back of house: verify listings, move money, and judge disputes.
Admin.loginSubtitle: Staff only — password and 2-factor code required.

UnansweredQuestions.title: Unanswered questions
UnansweredQuestions.subtitle: Questions น้องเรสต์ could not answer — suggest them to hosts as FAQ entries to grow coverage.
UnansweredQuestions.suggestConfirm: Suggest this question to the host as a FAQ entry?
UnansweredQuestions.successSuggest: Suggested as FAQ. The host will see it as a fill-in prompt.

ListingApprovalQueue.title: Listing approval queue
ListingApprovalQueue.subtitle: Review listings and KYC docs before they go live — ordered by submit time (24h SLA).
ListingApprovalQueue.checkNamesMatch: Names match across ID / doc / bank account
ListingApprovalQueue.checkMapCoherent: Map pin is coherent with documents
ListingApprovalQueue.rejectConfirm: Reject this listing? Documents will be purged in 90 days.
ListingApprovalQueue.needsInfoIntro: Tick the items the host must fix; add a note per item.
ListingApprovalQueue.legalBadgeIntro: Verify the hotel licence / non-hotel registration separately — never blocks listing approval.

ReportsQueue.title: Reports queue
ReportsQueue.subtitle: User-submitted reports — money-at-risk first, then by age (24h SLA).

Disputes.title: Disputes
Disputes.subtitle: Disputes awaiting a decision, and appeals awaiting a final ruling — oldest first
Disputes.pdpaNotice: Messages are shown unmasked solely to resolve this dispute. Every reveal is audited (PDPA).

AuditLog.title: Audit log
AuditLog.subtitle: Every admin money/trust action — who did what, when, and the before→after.
AuditLog.atCap: Showing the latest {n} entries — narrow the filters to see older ones.

Reviews.title: Review moderation
Reviews.subtitle: Flagged reviews — remove only for policy violations (doxxing, hate, extortion, spam), never because a host disagrees.
Reviews.removeReasonPlaceholder: Removal reason (recorded in the audit log)

Payouts.title: Host payouts
Payouts.subtitle: Bookings ready to pay out, grouped by host account — reconcile against the Opn balance before every transfer.
Payouts.reconcileOk: Reconciled — Opn balance {balance} covers the ledger obligation {obligation}. Clear to pay.
Payouts.reconcileBlocked: Mismatch — Opn balance {balance} does not cover the ledger obligation {obligation}. All payouts blocked until resolved.
Payouts.reconcileError: Could not reconcile against Opn — payouts blocked as a precaution.
Payouts.revealHint: Revealing the account number is recorded in the audit log.
Payouts.markPaidConfirm: Confirm the transfer to the host has been made?
Payouts.holdHostTitle: Hold all payouts for this host

Reports.title: My reports
Reports.submitted: Report submitted — our team will review and update you
Reports.loginToReport: Sign in to report a booking problem

Footer.trustLine: Your money stays with U-Rest until you check out

Wizard.title: List your villa
Wizard.intro: Complete each step — we autosave your draft as you go.
Wizard.photosHint: At least 5 photos; pick one as the cover.
Wizard.uploadStubNote: Dev mode: real R2 upload wires in later (#11)

bookingMode.REQUEST_HINT: Guests request; you confirm before they pay.
bookingMode.INSTANT_HINT: Guests book and pay immediately; no confirmation step.

Wizard.instantAck: My calendar is always up to date — if a stale calendar causes a paid double-booking, the system cancels as CANCELLED_BY_HOST and records a strike immediately.
Wizard.seasonsHint: Define special-price ranges (e.g. high season); ranges must not overlap.
Wizard.kycHint: Every villa is identity-checked before it goes live — this is what lets guests pay with confidence. Documents are stored privately and seen only by our review team.

kycDocTypes.RIGHT_TO_RENT: Proof of ownership / right to rent

Wizard.kycRedactNote: Please cover or black out the religion line on your ID copy before uploading.
Wizard.kycNameMatchWarning: The account name must match the name on your ID — a mismatch delays approval.
Wizard.payoutSavedMasked: For your security, re-enter your account number to confirm.
Wizard.kycConsentLabel: I consent to U-Rest processing these documents to verify my identity (privacy policy).
Wizard.errorSeasonOverlap: Season ranges overlap — please make them disjoint.
Wizard.errorSeasonIncomplete: Fill in dates and rates for every season.
Wizard.errorIncomplete: Fill in all required fields before submitting.
Wizard.errorInstantAck: Accept the calendar terms before enabling instant book.
Wizard.errorKycIncomplete: Upload your Thai ID, proof of right to rent, and a selfie, and accept the consent.
Wizard.errorPayoutRequired: Add a valid payout bank account before submitting.
Wizard.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Search.title: Find a villa
Search.noResultsHint: Try widening your dates or removing filters
Search.aiSuggest: Let AI pick from these results

ListingDetail.cancellationFlexible: Free cancellation up to 24 hrs before check-in
ListingDetail.cancellationModerate: Free cancellation up to 5 days before check-in
ListingDetail.cancellationStrict: Free cancellation up to 14 days before check-in
ListingDetail.reviewsEmpty: No reviews yet — be the first to stay
ListingDetail.conciergeChip: Ask น้องเรสต์ about this villa

BookingCard.title: Check price & book
BookingCard.ctaNoCharge: No charge yet — pay after the host confirms
BookingCard.ctaInstantCharge: Immediate payment — confirmed right away, no waiting

Booking.notePlaceholder: How many of you, what's the occasion…
Booking.errorUnavailable: This villa isn't accepting requests right now
Booking.errorDatesTaken: Those dates are already booked — please pick others
Booking.errorPhoneUnverified: Please verify your phone before sending a request
Booking.errorUnauthenticated: Please sign in before sending a request
Booking.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again
Booking.cancelWillRefund: Cancel this booking — you'll be refunded {amount}
Booking.respondByNote: Waiting for the host — the request expires automatically if the deadline passes
Booking.contactMasked: Contact is shared after the booking is confirmed
Booking.payCountdown: Pay within the time limit to confirm your booking
Booking.payEscrowNote: Your money is held safely in escrow and released to the host after checkout
Booking.payRefundPromise: Not as advertised? Report before checkout for a full refund
Booking.payScanQr: Scan this QR with your banking app to pay
Booking.errorPaymentFailed: Payment failed — please try again or switch method
Booking.errorWrongState: This booking is no longer in the payment step

Disputes.title: Report a problem with your stay
Disputes.freezeNotice: When you submit, the booking payment is held while our team reviews, and the host is notified to respond within 48 hours.
Disputes.detailPlaceholder: What went wrong during your stay?
Disputes.statusOpen: Your case is under review. We'll let you know the outcome.
Disputes.ineligible: You can't open a dispute for this booking yet
Disputes.appealError: Couldn't appeal — you may have already appealed or the window has passed

Reviews.title: Write a review
Reviews.textPlaceholder: How was the villa? Anything future guests should know?
Reviews.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your review — please try again
Reviews.ineligible: This booking can't be reviewed yet
Reviews.flagReason: Reason (e.g. doxxing, hate speech, extortion, spam)

Thread.empty: No messages yet — start the conversation
Thread.maskingNotice: Phone numbers, LINE IDs, links and account numbers are hidden until the booking is confirmed — book and pay through U-Rest only, for your safety.
Thread.unmaskedNote: Booking confirmed — you can now share contact details and check-in info.
Thread.errorNotOwner: You don't have access to this conversation

Concierge.pageTitle: น้องเรสต์ (AI Concierge)
Concierge.inputPlaceholder: Ask น้องเรสต์… e.g. villa for 10 near Jomtien Beach with karaoke
Concierge.greeting: Hi! I'm น้องเรสต์, your AI villa finder. Tell me what you're looking for 🏖️
Concierge.examplePrompt1: Villa for 10 near Jomtien, with karaoke
Concierge.examplePrompt2: Pool villa under ฿5,000/night with a slide
Concierge.restModeTitle: น้องเรสต์ is resting 🌙
Concierge.errorGeneric: น้องเรสต์ hit a snag — please try again.
Concierge.errorDailyLimit: You've reached today's {limit}-message limit. Come back tomorrow!
Concierge.errorTokenCeiling: This conversation got very long. Start a fresh chat below.
Concierge.loginPrompt: Sign in to save your chat history and unlock all features
Concierge.cardPhoneNeeded: Please verify your phone number before booking

SavedVillas.emptyHint: Tap the heart on any villa to save it for later
SavedVillas.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again

Host.needsInfoCta: Our team requested more info — fix it to resubmit

needsInfo.title: Fixes requested
needsInfo.intro: Our team asked you to fix the items below before approval. Fix each, mark it done, then resubmit for review.
needsInfo.resubmitDisabledHint: Fix every item before you can resubmit

requests.title: Booking requests
requests.contactMasked: Contact is shared after the booking is confirmed
requests.respondByNote: Respond within 12h or the request expires

bookings.title: Confirmed bookings
bookings.cancelWarn: A host cancellation refunds the guest 100% and records a strike (3 strikes = suspension).
bookings.rateReasonLabel: Note (optional, not shown to the guest)
bookings.rateReasonPlaceholder: Looked after the villa / easy to reach, etc.
bookings.rateError: Couldn't save the rating — please try again

Host.listingsEmpty: No villas yet — start your first listing
Host.calendarIntro: Tap a date to block/unblock it — one calendar per villa
Host.calendarNoListings: No published villas to manage a calendar for yet
Host.strikeWarning: Block only genuinely unavailable dates (owner use / maintenance) and keep them current so a paid U-Rest guest is never double-booked
Host.strikeWarningInstant: ⚡ Instant-book villa: there is no accept step to catch a stale calendar — a double-booking forces CANCELLED_BY_HOST and an immediate strike
Host.locationReReviewWarning: Editing the location hides the listing until the team re-approves it
Host.docsContactNote: Need to edit documents or bank account? Please contact the team (editable in a later phase)
Host.faqIntro: Q&A that น้องเรสต์ uses to answer guests on your behalf
Host.faqEmpty: No questions yet — add the first to help น้องเรสต์ answer guests
Host.errorNotEditable: This villa can't be edited in its current state
Host.errorSeasonOverlap: Seasons overlap — please adjust so they don't
Host.errorInstantAck: You must accept the calendar terms before enabling instant book
Host.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again

Profile.title: My account
Profile.name: Name
Profile.notificationsDesc: Choose how U-Rest reaches you for each kind of update.
Profile.connectLine: Connect LINE to receive push notifications
Profile.exportDesc: Get a JSON copy of your U-Rest data — bookings, messages, reviews and more.
Profile.dangerDesc: Permanently delete your account. If you have bookings, your personal details are removed but the booking and payment records are kept to meet our financial and legal obligations.
Profile.deleteConfirmAck: I understand this can't be undone
Profile.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again
